original: The T1-K4 is a unique Steele Tech prototype of nursedroid designed to rival JoyCo’s autonomous medics. A change in corporate priorities shut her line’s development down, but your input saved this masterpiece of engineering and medical technology. Tika’s now more than a match for any of them in terms of mobile, emergency support, thanks to her hovering undercarriage and extended array of skills. She’s capable of impairing foes and increasing her assigned caretaker’s resilience on the field, making her a perfect asset for long, dangerous treks or exploration missions. Her advanced sensors and healing subroutines make her a very careful and affectionate partner, an invaluable assistant for any VIP.
